name: agent-config-skills
description: Manage your AI coding setup as one personal git repo, fanned out to Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex.

plugins.name: agent-config-skills
plugins.description: Four-skill suite: bootstrap (~/agent-config) with agent-config-init, keep machines in sync with agent-config-sync, scaffold new repos with agent-config-new-project, and migrate existing repos with agent-config-harvest.
